cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question says today is the second day of the third month of 1966, so that would be March 2nd, 1966. So yes, the next day after March 2nd is March 3rd. Now, let's look at the options. The options are given in MM/DD/YYYY format. Let me check each one: (A) 03/03/1966 - This would be March 3rd, 1966. That seems correct. (B) 03/24/1966 - This is March 24th, which is way later in the month. That doesn't seem right. (C) 03/04/1966 - This is March 4th, also later in the month than it should be. (D) 02/28/1966 - This is February 28th, which is in the previous month. Not correct. (E) 03/02/1966 - This is the same as today's date. So not correct.
